response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements implemented during the game's redevelopment. Although we have successfully nearly doubled the frame rate by incorporating optimization features into the framework, the integration of new hardware-intensive features such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands introduces new performance considerations. We will work to maintain a balance between these elements.  

Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the redeveloped game, each character has a specific stomach capacity that determines how much "body fluid" they can accommodate in their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr.Anya can hold up to 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet is limited to 2800ml. Male test subjects release a different amount of fluid into the character's body based on their type: a Dreamer typically ejaculates around 10-15ml per climax, while an Elder Thing can pump 400-600ml into their partner.  

Picture #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice graphics. The fluid effects are not pre-designed for sex scenes and instead trigger dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy levels, and stamina. Certain character abilities, obtained through testing with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or excessive squirting.  

Picture #4 and #5 depict dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR. The hands are controlled using a VR controller.  

Pictures #6, #7, and #8 present previews of upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sex scenarios. More details will be released in the upcoming month.  

The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
